title: Golf club tees off in the new year
description: GOLF NEWS - The first golf of 2024 took...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GOLF NEWS - The first golf of 2024 took place on 3 January with golf enthusiasts gathering to participate in the individual Stableford competition.","html":"GOLF NEWS - The first golf of 2024 took place on 3 January with golf enthusiasts gathering to participate in the individual Stableford competition."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the sweltering heat of the day, the 19th hole added an extra layer of enjoyment to the proceedings.","html":"In the sweltering heat of the day, the 19th hole added an extra layer of enjoyment to the proceedings."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The following competitions were played:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Individual Stableford competition - 3 January","html":"Individual Stableford competition - 3 January"},{"type":"list","items":["First prize - Jaco Venter - 37","Second prize - André Olivier - 37","Third prize - Derek Light - 37","Two Clubs - Jaco Venter, JL du Plessis, Grant Marais, Bets Henning and C Marais"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Medal competition - 6 January","html":"Medal competition - 6 January"},{"type":"list","items":["A Division - Rico Bester","B Division - Deon Arnoldi","C Division - André Olivier","Winner - Rico Bester","Two Club - Dennis Hendriks"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Golf club tees off in the new year
